expectations.evidence: File is markdown with headings (##, ###), tables, and ASCII state machine diagrams — no structured entity/value/command/event blocks
Entities described: Event (Aggregate Root), Ticket (Aggregate Root), WaitlistEntry, Organizer, Buyer (5 entities in markdown)
Event and Ticket are both labeled 'Aggregate Root' at lines 9 and 25
Three state machines documented in ASCII: Event Lifecycle (line 190), Ticket Lifecycle (line 204), Waitlist Entry Lifecycle (line 216)

Domain Rules and Invariants section at line 304 lists 8 invariants including capacity enforcement, sales window, sliding-scale refund, transfer restrictions, waitlist fairness, reservation timeout, event cancellation cascade, one ticket per buyer per tier
Preconditions on commands (e.g. ReserveTicket requires remaining capacity and open sales window); reservation timeout/expiration flows; TicketCancelledDueToEventCancellation error event
